codeReview.summary: The handoff doc is broad and mostly aligned with controllers/DTOs, but it contains blocking accuracy issues in core flow/state-machine semantics (dispatch reserve step and production lifecycle transition), plus a few completeness gaps around auth and feature-flagged endpoints.

issues.description: Dispatch flow documents reservation as `POST /api/v1/sales/orders/{id}/confirm`, but that endpoint only sets order status to CONFIRMED and does not reserve inventory or create/update packaging slip reservations.

Production lifecycle claims `PARTIAL_PACKED -> READY_TO_PACK` can happen via recalculation, but current packing logic only increments packed quantity atomically; there is no decrement/reversal path from PARTIAL back to READY in implemented workflows.

Raw-material section states a controller-level default auth that includes ROLE_FACTORY, but `/api/v1/raw-materials/intake` is explicitly restricted to ADMIN/ACCOUNTING. This can mislead frontend role gating for that operation.

Endpoints `/api/v1/raw-material-batches/{rawMaterialId}` and `/api/v1/factory/production-batches` are documented as generally available, but both are feature-flag/profile gated in service logic (disabled by default in prod unless explicitly enabled).
Dispatch reserve step in documented user flow is inaccurate.
issues.evidence: Doc: .factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:1249 says reserve via POST /api/v1/sales/orders/{id}/confirm. Code: SalesController.java:85-88 maps this endpoint; SalesService.java:881-884 only sets status CONFIRMED. Actual dispatch/inventory mutation occurs via DispatchController.java:94-122 using salesService.confirmDispatch(...).

issues.description: Documented production-log transition PARTIAL_PACKED -> READY_TO_PACK is not reachable in implemented flow.
issues.evidence: Doc: .factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:1263 states transition is possible. Code: ProductionLogRepository.java:27-31 only increments totalPackedQuantity; PackingService.java:370-376 can set READY_TO_PACK only when packedQuantity <= 0, which cannot occur after partial packing under increment-only updates.

issues.description: Auth detail mismatch for raw-material intake endpoint.
issues.evidence: Doc: .factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:1130 sets raw-material auth default including ROLE_FACTORY and line 1143 lists intake endpoint without override note. Code: RawMaterialController.java:77-78 adds endpoint-specific @PreAuthorize('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_ACCOUNTING') for /raw-materials/intake.

issues.description: Feature-flag/profile gating for documented endpoints is omitted from handoff.
issues.evidence: Doc includes POST /api/v1/raw-material-batches/{rawMaterialId} (.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:1142) and POST /api/v1/factory/production-batches (:1180). Code gates: RawMaterialService.java:87,215-219 (erp.raw-material.intake.enabled; disabled path throws BUSINESS_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION) and FactoryService.java:47,244-251 (erp.factory.legacy-batch.enabled and prod-profile check).

sharedStateObservations.observation: backend-worker skill procedure is not explicit about how to validate documentation-only features against backend behavior (flow semantics/state transitions/role constraints), which contributed to factual drift in this handoff.
sharedStateObservations.rationale: The skill focuses on TDD/compile/test flow; documentation-only work can pass those checks while still being behavior-inaccurate unless there is an explicit cross-check step against controllers/services.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md emphasizes test-first + compile/test and handoff writing, but does not include a mandatory endpoint/flow/state-machine trace-back checklist for doc-only features.

summary: Review failed due to two blocking documentation inaccuracies: an incorrect dispatch reservation flow step and an impossible production lifecycle transition. Additional non-blocking gaps exist around role-specific auth clarity and feature-flag/prod gating disclosure for certain endpoints.
